content.thinking:
用户遇到了 127.0.0.1 拒绝连接的错误。这通常意味着：
1. 他们可能在尝试访问某个本地服务
2. 可能是 Android 应用的某个功能需要本地服务器
3. 或者是在尝试访问应用中的某个功能时出现的错误

从项目代码来看，这个应用有：
- LocalTranscriptionService.kt - 本地转录服务
- WhisperService.kt - Whisper 服务
- AIService.kt - AI 服务

很可能是应用中某个功能需要连接到本地运行的服务（比如转录服务），但该服务没有启动。

让我先看看这些服务的代码，了解它们需要什么样的本地服务。

content.text: 看起来应用需要连接本地服务但服务未启动。让我检查一下项目中需要哪些本地服务。

     5→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AIConfig

    13→
    14→/**

    20→ * 3. **Android SpeechRecognizer** - 原生方案（免费，多语言）
    21→ *
    22→ * ## Sherpa-ONNX 集成方案（推荐）
    23→ *
    24→ * ### 优点
    25→ * - 专为移动端优化，性能好
    26→ * - 支持多种 Whisper 模型（tiny/base/small）
    27→ * - 完全离线，无需网络
    28→ * - 提供 Android AAR 包，集成简单
    29→ * - 支持实时转录和文件转录

    43→ * 3. 将模型文件放到 assets/models/ 目录

    45→ * 4. 使用示例：

    48→ *        modelConfig = OfflineModelConfig(
    49→ *            whisper = OfflineWhisperModelConfig(
    50→ *                encoder = "assets/models/whisper-tiny-encoder.onnx",
    51→ *                decoder = "assets/models/whisper-tiny-decoder.onnx"
    52→ *            )
    53→ *        )
    54→ *    )

    59→ *    val result = recognizer.getResult(stream)

    61→ *
    62→ * ### 性能对比

    64→ * - base 模型：约 1-2x 实时速度（1分钟音频需要30-60秒）

    92→ * - 性能足够好（tiny 模型可达 2-3x 实时速度）
    93→ * - 完全离线，保护隐私
    94→ * - 支持多语言
    95→ */

    99→) {

   112→    }
   113→
   114→    /**
   115→     * 本地转录结果
   116→     */
   117→    data class LocalTranscriptionResult(
   118→        val success: Boolean,
   119→        val text: String = "",
   120→        val words: List<WordTimestamp> = emptyList(),
   121→        val detectedLang: String = "",
   122→        val error: String = ""
   123→    )
   124→
   125→    /**
   126→     * 使用 Sherpa-ONNX 进行本地转录（推荐方案）
   127→     *
   128→     * 注意：需要先集成 Sherpa-ONNX 库和模型文件

   131→     * @param audioFile 音频文件

   189→        try {

   191→

   193→            // 这里返回不支持状态，需要完整实现 UI 层
   194→            // 实际实现需要：
   195→            // 1. 使用 MediaPlayer 播放音频
   196→            // 2. 使用 SpeechRecognizer 监听语音
   197→            // 3. 将识别结果收集
   198→            // 4. 重复直到音频结束
   199→
   200→            LocalTranscriptionResult(
   201→                success = false,
   202→                error = "Android SpeechRecognizer 需要播放式转录\n\n当前仅支持在线 Groq API\n\n如需本地转录，请使用小文件（<1分钟）进行测试"
   203→            )

   208→                success = false,
   209→                error = "本地转录失败: ${e.message}"
   210→            )
   211→        }
   212→    }
   213→
   214→    /**
   215→     * 检查本地转录引擎是否可用
   216→     */
   217→    fun checkEngineAvailability(engine: String): EngineAvailability {
   218→        return when (engine) {
   219→            ENGINE_SHERPA_ONNX -> {
   220→                // Sherpa-ONNX 需要集成库和模型
   221→                EngineAvailability(
   222→                    engine = engine,
   223→                    available = false,  // TODO: 集成后改为 true
   224→                    name = "Sherpa-ONNX (推荐)",
   225→                    description = "离线高性能转录，支持多语言，专为移动端优化",
   226→                    supportedLanguages = listOf("zh-CN", "en-US", "ja-JP", "ko-KR", "ru-RU", "es-ES", "fr-FR", "de-DE"),
   227→                    offline = true,

   229→                    modelSize = "75MB (tiny) / 142MB (base) / 466MB (small)",
   230→                    speed = "2-3x 实时速度 (tiny模型)"
   231→                )
   232→            }
   233→            ENGINE_ANDROID_SPEECH -> {
   234→                // Android SpeechRecognizer 总是可用（系统原生）
   235→                EngineAvailability(
   236→                    engine = engine,
   237→                    available = true,
   238→                    name = "Android 语音识别",
   239→                    description = "系统原生，无需网络，支持多种语言",
   240→                    supportedLanguages = listOf("zh-CN", "en-US", "ja-JP", "ko-KR", "ru-RU"),
   241→                    offline = true,
   242→                    speed = "实时"
   243→                )
   244→            }
   245→            ENGINE_WHISPER_CPP -> {
   246→                // Whisper.cpp 需要 NDK 编译
   247→                EngineAvailability(
   248→                    engine = engine,
   249→                    available = false,
   250→                    name = "Whisper.cpp",
   251→                    description = "高性能离线转录，需 NDK 集成",
   252→                    supportedLanguages = listOf("zh-CN", "en-US", "ja-JP"),
   253→                    offline = true,
   254→                    requiresModel = true,
   255→                    modelSize = "75MB (tiny) / 142MB (base)",
   256→                    speed = "3-5x 实时速度"
   257→                )
   258→            }
   259→            else -> {
   260→                EngineAvailability(
   261→                    engine = "unknown",
   262→                    available = false,
   263→                    name = "未知引擎",
   264→                    description = "不支持的转录引擎"
   265→                )
   266→            }
   267→        }
   268→    }
   269→
   270→    /**
   271→     * 获取推荐的转录引擎
   272→     */
   273→    fun getRecommendedEngine(fileSize: Long, hasNetwork: Boolean): String {
   274→        return when {
   275→            hasNetwork && fileSize < 100 * 1024 * 1024 -> {
   276→                // 有网络且文件小于100MB，使用在线 API
   277→                "groq"
   278→            }
   279→            !hasNetwork -> {
   280→                // 无网络，使用 Android 原生
   281→                ENGINE_ANDROID_SPEECH
   282→            }
   283→            else -> {
   284→                // 大文件，建议分段或压缩
   285→                "groq"
   286→            }
   287→        }
   288→    }
   289→}
   290→
   291→/**
   292→ * 转录引擎可用性信息
   293→ */
   294→data class EngineAvailability(
   295→    val engine: String,
   296→    val available: Boolean,
   297→    val name: String,
   298→    val description: String = "",
   299→    val supportedLanguages: List<String> = emptyList(),
   300→    val offline: Boolean = false,
   301→    val requiresModel: Boolean = false,
   302→    val modelSize: String = "",  // 模型大小说明
   303→    val speed: String = ""  // 速度说明
   304→)

file.content:
package com.multilanglearner.data.network

import android.content.Context
import android.util.Log
import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AIConfig
import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.WordTimestamp
import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext
import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
import java.io.File
import javax.inject.Inject
import javax.inject.Singleton

/**
 * 本地转录服务接口
 *
 * 支持的引擎：
 * 1. **Sherpa-ONNX** - 推荐方案（离线、高性能、多语言）
 * 2. **Whisper.cpp** - 高性能方案（需 NDK 编译）
 * 3. **Android SpeechRecognizer** - 原生方案（免费，多语言）
 *
 * ## Sherpa-ONNX 集成方案（推荐）
 *
 * ### 优点
 * - 专为移动端优化，性能好
 * - 支持多种 Whisper 模型（tiny/base/small）
 * - 完全离线，无需网络
 * - 提供 Android AAR 包，集成简单
 * - 支持实时转录和文件转录
 *
 * ### 集成步骤
 * 1. 添加依赖到 build.gradle.kts：
 *    ```kotlin
 *    implementation("com.k2fsa.sherpa:onnx:1.10.0")
 *    ```
 *
 * 2. 下载模型文件（选择一个）：
 *    - tiny: 75MB (最快，准确率较低)
 *    - base: 142MB (平衡)
 *    - small: 466MB (最准确，较慢)
 *    下载地址: https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases
 *
 * 3. 将模型文件放到 assets/models/ 目录
 *
 * 4. 使用示例：
 *    ```kotlin
 *    val config = OfflineRecognizerConfig(
 *        modelConfig = OfflineModelConfig(
 *            whisper = OfflineWhisperModelConfig(
 *                encoder = "assets/models/whisper-tiny-encoder.onnx",
 *                decoder = "assets/models/whisper-tiny-decoder.onnx"
 *            )
 *        )
 *    )
 *    val recognizer = OfflineRecognizer(context, config)
 *    val stream = recognizer.createStream()
 *    stream.acceptWaveform(audioSamples, sampleRate)
 *    recognizer.decode(stream)
 *    val result = recognizer.getResult(stream)
 *    ```
 *
 * ### 性能对比
 * - tiny 模型：约 2-3x 实时速度（1分钟音频需要20-30秒）
 * - base 模型：约 1-2x 实时速度（1分钟音频需要30-60秒）
 * - small 模型：约 0.5-1x 实时速度（1分钟音频需要60-120秒）
 *
 * ### 内存占用
 * - tiny: ~200MB
 * - base: ~400MB
 * - small: ~800MB
 *
 * ## Whisper.cpp 集成方案（高级）
 *
 * ### 优点
 * - C++ 实现，性能最优
 * - 支持量化模型，内存占用更小
 *
 * ### 缺点
 * - 需要 NDK 编译
 * - 集成复杂度高
 * - 需要 JNI 桥接
 *
 * ### 集成步骤
 * 1. 克隆 whisper.cpp: https://github.com/ggerganov/whisper.cpp
 * 2. 使用 NDK 编译 Android 库
 * 3. 创建 JNI 桥接层
 * 4. 集成到项目
 *
 * ## 推荐方案
 * 对于本项目，推荐使用 **Sherpa-ONNX**：
 * - 集成简单（只需添加依赖和模型文件）
 * - 性能足够好（tiny 模型可达 2-3x 实时速度）
 * - 完全离线，保护隐私
 * - 支持多语言
 */
@Singleton
class LocalTranscriptionService @Inject constructor(
    @ApplicationContext private val context: Context
) {
    companion object {
        private const val TAG = "LocalTranscription"

        // 转录引擎类型
        const val ENGINE_SHERPA_ONNX = "sherpa_onnx"  // 推荐
        const val ENGINE_WHISPER_CPP = "whisper_cpp"
        const val ENGINE_ANDROID_SPEECH = "android_speech"

        // Sherpa-ONNX 模型类型
        const val MODEL_TINY = "tiny"   // 75MB, 最快
        const val MODEL_BASE = "base"   // 142MB, 平衡
        const val MODEL_SMALL = "small" // 466MB, 最准确
    }

    /**
     * 本地转录结果
     */
    data class LocalTranscriptionResult(
        val success: Boolean,
        val text: String = "",
        val words: List<WordTimestamp> = emptyList(),
        val detectedLang: String = "",
        val error: String = ""
    )

    /**
     * 使用 Sherpa-ONNX 进行本地转录（推荐方案）
     *
     * 注意：需要先集成 Sherpa-ONNX 库和模型文件
     * 集成步骤见类文档顶部说明
     *
     * @param audioFile 音频文件
     * @param modelType 模型类型（tiny/base/small）
     * @param lang 语言代码
     * @param onProgress 进度回调
     */
    suspend fun transcribeWithSherpaOnnx(
        audioFile: File,
        modelType: String = MODEL_TINY,
        lang: String? = null,
        onProgress: (Int, String) -> Unit = { _, _ -> }
    ): LocalTranscriptionResult = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
        try {
            Log.d(TAG, "Transcribing with Sherpa-ONNX: ${audioFile.name}, model=$modelType")

            // TODO: 集成 Sherpa-ONNX 后实现
            // 1. 加载模型
            // 2. 读取音频文件
            // 3. 转换为 16kHz 单声道 PCM
            // 4. 调用 Sherpa-ONNX API 转录
            // 5. 返回结果

            LocalTranscriptionResult(
                success = false,
                error = "Sherpa-ONNX 尚未集成\n\n集成步骤：\n" +
                    "1. 添加依赖: implementation(\"com.k2fsa.sherpa:onnx:1.10.0\")\n" +
                    "2. 下载模型文件到 assets/models/\n" +
                    "3. 实现转录逻辑\n\n" +
                    "当前使用在线 Groq API 转录"
            )

        } catch (e: Exception) {
            Log.e(TAG, "Sherpa-ONNX transcription error", e)
            LocalTranscriptionResult(
                success = false,
                error = "本地转录失败: ${e.message}"
            )
        }
    }

    /**
     * 使用 Android SpeechRecognizer 进行转录
     *
     * 优点：
     * - 无需网络
     * - 免费
     * - 支持多种语言
     * - 系统原生，性能好
     *
     * 限制：
     * - 需要将音频分段播放转录（不支持文件直接转录）
     * - 时长限制（每个分段约30秒）
     * - 没有词级别时间戳
     */
    suspend fun transcribeWithAndroidSpeech(
        audioFile: File,
        lang: String? = null,
        onProgress: (Int, String) -> Unit = { _, _ -> }
    ): LocalTranscriptionResult = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
        try {
            Log.d(TAG, "Transcribing with Android SpeechRecognizer: ${audioFile.name}")

            // Android SpeechRecognizer 需要 AudioTrack 播放音频并监听
            // 这里返回不支持状态，需要完整实现 UI 层
            // 实际实现需要：
            // 1. 使用 MediaPlayer 播放音频
            // 2. 使用 SpeechRecognizer 监听语音
            // 3. 将识别结果收集
            // 4. 重复直到音频结束

            LocalTranscriptionResult(
                success = false,
                error = "Android SpeechRecognizer 需要播放式转录\n\n当前仅支持在线 Groq API\n\n如需本地转录，请使用小文件（<1分钟）进行测试"
            )

        } catch (e: Exception) {
            Log.e(TAG, "Android Speech transcription error", e)
            LocalTranscriptionResult(
                success = false,
                error = "本地转录失败: ${e.message}"
            )
        }
    }

    /**
     * 检查本地转录引擎是否可用
     */
    fun checkEngineAvailability(engine: String): EngineAvailability {
        return when (engine) {
            ENGINE_SHERPA_ONNX -> {
                // Sherpa-ONNX 需要集成库和模型
                EngineAvailability(
                    engine = engine,
                    available = false,  // TODO: 集成后改为 true
                    name = "Sherpa-ONNX (推荐)",
                    description = "离线高性能转录，支持多语言，专为移动端优化",
                    supportedLanguages = listOf("zh-CN", "en-US", "ja-JP", "ko-KR", "ru-RU", "es-ES", "fr-FR", "de-DE"),
                    offline = true,
                    requiresModel = true,
                    modelSize = "75MB (tiny) / 142MB (base) / 466MB (small)",
                    speed = "2-3x 实时速度 (tiny模型)"
                )
            }
            ENGINE_ANDROID_SPEECH -> {
                // Android SpeechRecognizer 总是可用（系统原生）
                EngineAvailability(
                    engine = engine,
                    available = true,
                    name = "Android 语音识别",
                    description = "系统原生，无需网络，支持多种语言",
                    supportedLanguages = listOf("zh-CN", "en-US", "ja-JP", "ko-KR", "ru-RU"),
                    offline = true,
                    speed = "实时"
                )
            }
            ENGINE_WHISPER_CPP -> {
                // Whisper.cpp 需要 NDK 编译
                EngineAvailability(
                    engine = engine,
                    available = false,
                    name = "Whisper.cpp",
                    description = "高性能离线转录，需 NDK 集成",
                    supportedLanguages = listOf("zh-CN", "en-US", "ja-JP"),
                    offline = true,
                    requiresModel = true,
                    modelSize = "75MB (tiny) / 142MB (base)",
                    speed = "3-5x 实时速度"
                )
            }
            else -> {
                EngineAvailability(
                    engine = "unknown",
                    available = false,
                    name = "未知引擎",
                    description = "不支持的转录引擎"
                )
            }
        }
    }

    /**
     * 获取推荐的转录引擎
     */
    fun getRecommendedEngine(fileSize: Long, hasNetwork: Boolean): String {
        return when {
            hasNetwork && fileSize < 100 * 1024 * 1024 -> {
                // 有网络且文件小于100MB，使用在线 API
                "groq"
            }
            !hasNetwork -> {
                // 无网络，使用 Android 原生
                ENGINE_ANDROID_SPEECH
            }
            else -> {
                // 大文件，建议分段或压缩
                "groq"
            }
        }
    }
}

/**
 * 转录引擎可用性信息
 */
data class EngineAvailability(
    val engine: String,
    val available: Boolean,
    val name: String,
    val description: String = "",
    val supportedLanguages: List<String> = emptyList(),
    val offline: Boolean = false,
    val requiresModel: Boolean = false,
    val modelSize: String = "",  // 模型大小说明
    val speed: String = ""  // 速度说明
)

1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network

     3→import android.util.Log

    14→import javax.inject.Inject

    16→
    17→@Serializable
    18→data class WhisperResult(
    19→    val success: Boolean,
    20→    val text: String = "",
    21→    val words: List<WordTimestamp> = emptyList(),
    22→    val detectedLang: String = "",
    23→    val error: String = ""
    24→)
    25→
    26→@Singleton
    27→class WhisperService @Inject constructor() {
    28→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    29→        .connectTimeout(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS)  // 减少连接超时，加快重试
    30→        .readTimeout(600, TimeUnit.SECONDS)    // 增加读取超时，支持长音频
    31→        .writeTimeout(120, TimeUnit.SECONDS)   // 增加写入超时
    32→        .retryOnConnectionFailure(true)        // 启用自动重试
    33→        .build()
    34→
    35→    private val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
    36→
    37→    // Groq API 文件大小限制（官方限制 25MB，设置安全值）
    38→    // 参考：https://console.groq.com/docs/speech-to-text
    39→    private val MAX_FILE_SIZE = 25 * 1024 * 1024L
    40→    private val MIN_FILE_SIZE = 1024L // 最小 1KB，避免空文件或太小的文件
    41→
    42→    // 最大重试次数
    43→    private val MAX_RETRIES = 3
    44→
    45→    /**
    46→     * Transcribe audio via Groq Whisper API
    47→     * 优先使用 groqApiKey，其次使用 provider 为 groq 时的 apiKey
    48→     * 重试由上层 FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService 统一管理，避免重复重试
    49→     */
    50→    suspend fun transcribeGroq(audioFile: File, config: AIConfig, lang: String? = null, contextPrompt: String? = null): WhisperResult? {
    51→        return transcribeGroqInternal(audioFile, config, lang, contextPrompt)
    52→    }
    53→
    54→    /**
    55→     * 检查是否是速率限制错误（429）
    56→     * 从错误消息中提取需要等待的时间（秒）
    57→     */
    58→    fun isRateLimitError(errorMsg: String): Pair<Boolean, Int> {
    59→        val rateLimitPattern = Regex("Please try again in (\\d+)s")
    60→        val match = rateLimitPattern.find(errorMsg)
    61→        return if (match != null) {
    62→            val seconds = match.groupValues[1].toIntOrNull() ?: 0
    63→            Pair(true, seconds)
    64→        } else {
    65→            Pair(false, 0)
    66→        }
    67→    }
    68→
    69→    /**
    70→     * 内部转录实现
    71→     */
    72→    private suspend fun transcribeGroqInternal(audioFile: File, config: AIConfig, lang: String? = null, contextPrompt: String? = null): WhisperResult? {
    73→        // 获取 Groq API Key：优先使用专门的 groqApiKey，其次检查 provider 是否为 groq
    74→        val apiKey = config.groqApiKey.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
    75→            ?: (config.apiKey.takeIf { config.provider == "groq" && it.isNotBlank() })
    76→            ?: return WhisperResult(success = false, error = "❌ 未配置 Groq API Key\n\n请前往「AI 设置」配置 Groq API Key。\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys")
    77→
    78→        val whisperModel = config.whisperModel.ifBlank { "whisper-large-v3-turbo" }
    79→
    80→        // 检查文件大小
    81→        val fileSize = audioFile.length()
    82→        Log.d("WhisperService", "File size: $fileSize bytes, max: $MAX_FILE_SIZE")
    83→
    84→        // 检查最小文件大小
    85→        if (fileSize < MIN_FILE_SIZE) {
    86→            Log.e("WhisperService", "File too small: $fileSize bytes (min: $MIN_FILE_SIZE)")
    87→            return WhisperResult(
    88→                success = false,
    89→                error = "❌ 视频文件过小\n\n文件大小: ${fileSize / 1024} KB\n最小要求: 1 KB\n\n建议：请使用包含音频内容的有效视频文件"
    90→            )
    91→        }
    92→
    93→        if (fileSize > MAX_FILE_SIZE) {
    94→            val sizeMB = String.format("%.2f", fileSize / 1024.0 / 1024.0)
    95→            Log.e("WhisperService", "File too large: $sizeMB MB (max: 25 MB)")
    96→            return WhisperResult(
    97→                success = false,
    98→                error = "❌ 视频文件过大\n\n文件大小: $sizeMB MB\nGroq 限制: 25 MB\n\n建议解决方案：\n1. 应用会自动分段处理大文件\n2. 如果仍然失败，请使用较短的视频\n3. 或在设置中切换到其他 AI 提供商"
    99→            )
   100→        }
   101→
   102→        Log.d("WhisperService", "Starting transcription with Groq Whisper: model=$whisperModel, file=${audioFile.name}, size=$fileSize")
   103→
   104→        // 根据语言设置合适的 prompt，引导 Whisper 更准确地识别
   105→        val basePrompt = when (lang) {
   106→            "en" -> "Transcribe accurately with proper punctuation and capitalization."
   107→            "ja" -> "正確に句読点を付けて書き起こしてください。"
   108→            "ko" -> "정확하게 구두점을 포함하여 전사하세요."
   109→            "ru" -> "Транскрибируйте точно с правильной пунктуацией."
   110→            "th" -> "ถอดความอย่างถูกต้องพร้อมเครื่องหมายวรรคตอนที่เหมาะสม"
   111→            "vi" -> "Phiên âm chính xác với dấu câu đúng."
   112→            "ms" -> "Transkripsi dengan tepat dan tanda baca yang betul."
   113→            "id" -> "Transkripsikan dengan akurat dan tanda baca yang benar."
   114→            "ar" -> "انسخ بدقة مع علامات الترقيم الصحيحة."
   115→            "pt" -> "Transcreva com precisão e pontuação correta."
   116→            "es" -> "Transcribe con precisión y puntuación correcta."
   117→            "fr" -> "Transcrire avec précision et ponctuation correcte."
   118→            "de" -> "Transkribieren Sie genau mit korrekter Zeichensetzung."
   119→            "hi" -> "सटीक विराम चिह्नों के साथ सही ढंग से लिप्यंतरण करें।"
   120→            "zh" -> "准确转录，使用正确的标点符号。"
   121→            else -> "Transcribe accurately with proper punctuation and capitalization."
   122→        }
   123→        // 拼接上下文 prompt（前一段的最后几句话），帮助 Whisper 识别专有名词和连续语境
   124→        val prompt = if (!contextPrompt.isNullOrBlank()) {
   125→            "$basePrompt $contextPrompt"
   126→        } else {
   127→            basePrompt
   128→        }
   129→
   130→        val bodyBuilder = MultipartBody.Builder().setType(MultipartBody.FORM)
   131→            .addFormDataPart("file", audioFile.name, audioFile.asRequestBody("application/octet-stream".toMediaType()))
   132→            .addFormDataPart("model", whisperModel)
   133→            .addFormDataPart("response_format", "verbose_json")
   134→            .addFormDataPart("timestamp_granularities[]", "word")
   135→            .addFormDataPart("timestamp_granularities[]", "segment")
   136→            .addFormDataPart("temperature", "0")
   137→            .addFormDataPart("prompt", prompt)
   138→
   139→        lang?.let { bodyBuilder.addFormDataPart("language", it) }
   140→
   141→        val request = Request.Builder()
   142→            .url("https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions")
   143→            .addHeader("Authorization", "Bearer $apiKey")
   144→            .post(bodyBuilder.build())
   145→            .build()
   146→
   147→        return try {
   148→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Sending request to Groq API...")
   149→            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   150→
   151→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response code: ${response.code}")
   152→
   153→            if (response.code != 200) {
   154→                val errorBody = response.body?.string() ?: "Unknown error"
   155→                Log.e("WhisperService", "API error: $errorBody")
   156→
   157→                // 解析错误信息
   158→                val errorMsg = try {
   159→                    val errorJson = json.parseToJsonElement(errorBody).jsonObject
   160→                    val errObj = errorJson["error"]?.jsonObject
   161→                    val errMsg = errObj?.get("message")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   162→                    val errType = errObj?.get("type")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   163→                    val errCode = errObj?.get("code")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
   164→
   165→                    when {
   166→                        errMsg?.contains("invalid_api_key", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   167→                        errMsg?.contains("Unauthorized", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   168→                        response.code == 401 ->
   169→                            "❌ API Key 无效\n\n请检查 Groq API Key 是否正确配置\n\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys"

   171→                        errMsg?.contains("limit", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   172→                        errMsg?.contains("rate_limit", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   173→                        response.code == 429 ->
   174→                            "❌ API 配额已用完\n\nGroq API 使用次数已达限制\n\n建议：\n1. 等待配额重置\n2. 更换 API Key\n3. 升级 Groq 账户"
   175→                        errMsg?.contains("forbidden", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   176→                        errMsg?.contains("banned", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   177→                        response.code == 403 ->
   178→                            "❌ 转录被禁止\n\n${errMsg ?: "访问被限制"}\n\n可能原因：\n1. API Key 被禁用\n2. 账户存在违规行为\n3. 内容不符合使用条款"
   179→                        else -> "❌ 转录失败 ($response.code)\n\n${errMsg ?: errorBody}"
   180→                    }
   181→                } catch (e: Exception) {
   182→                    "❌ 转录失败\n\n${errorBody.take(200)}"
   183→                }
   184→
   185→                return WhisperResult(success = false, error = errorMsg)
   186→            }
   187→
   188→            val body = response.body?.string() ?: return WhisperResult(success = false, error = "空响应")
   189→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response length: ${body.length}")
   190→            Log.d("WhisperService", "Response body preview: ${body.take(500)}")
   191→
   192→            // 检查响应是否为有效的 JSON
   193→            if (!body.trim().startsWith("{") && !body.trim().startsWith("[")) {
   194→                Log.e("WhisperService", "Response is not valid JSON: ${body.take(200)}")
   195→                return WhisperResult(
   196→                    success = false,
   197→                    error = "❌ API 返回格式错误\n\nGroq API 返回了非 JSON 格式的响应。\n\n响应内容：\n${body.take(500)}"
   198→                )
   199→            }
   200→
   201→            try {
   202→                val jsonObj = json.parseToJsonElement(body).jsonObject
   203→                val text = jsonObj["text"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: ""
   204→                val detectedLang = jsonObj["language"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: ""
   205→
   206→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Transcribed text length: ${text.length}, detected language: $detectedLang")
   207→
   208→                val words = jsonObj["words"]?.jsonArray?.map { w ->
   209→                    val obj = w.jsonObject
   210→                    WordTimestamp(
   211→                        w = obj["word"]?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull ?: "",
   212→                        s = (obj["start"]?.jsonPrimitive?.doubleOrNull ?: 0.0),
   213→                        e = (obj["end"]?.jsonPrimitive?.doubleOrNull ?: 0.0)
   214→                    )
   215→                } ?: emptyList()
   216→
   217→                Log.d("WhisperService", "Word timestamps count: ${words.size}")
   218→
   219→                WhisperResult(
   220→                    success = true,
   221→                    text = text,
   222→                    words = words,
   223→                    detectedLang = detectedLang
   224→                )
   225→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   226→                Log.e("WhisperService", "JSON parsing error", e)
   227→                Log.e("WhisperService", "Response body: $body")
   228→                WhisperResult(
   229→                    success = false,
   230→                    error = "❌ 响应解析失败\n\nGroq API 返回了无法解析的响应。\n\n错误: ${e.message}\n\n响应内容：\n${body.take(500)}"
   231→                )
   232→            }
   233→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   234→            Log.e("WhisperService", "Transcription error", e)
   235→            val errorMsg = when {
   236→                e.message?.contains("timeout", ignoreCase = true) == true ->
   237→                    "❌ 请求超时\n\n网络连接超时，请检查网络连接后重试。"
   238→                e.message?.contains("Unable to resolve host", ignoreCase = true) == true ||
   239→                e.message?.contains("UnknownHost", ignoreCase = true) == true ->
   240→                    "❌ 网络连接失败\n\n无法连接到 Groq API 服务器，请检查网络连接。"
   241→                else -> "❌ 转录失败\n\n${e.message ?: "未知错误"}\n\n请检查网络连接和 API Key 配置后重试。"
   242→            }
   243→            WhisperResult(success = false, error = errorMsg)
   244→        }
   245→    }
   246→}
   247→

    87→                    ?.jsonObject?.get("message")?.jsonObject

package com.multilanglearner.data.network

import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AI_PROVIDERS
import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AIConfig
import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable
import kotlinx.serialization.json.*
import okhttp3.*
import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType
import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.toRequestBody
import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
import javax.inject.Inject
import javax.inject.Singleton

@Serializable
data class ChatMessage(val role: String, val content: String)

@Singleton
class AIService @Inject constructor() {
    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
        .connectTimeout(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
        .readTimeout(60, TimeUnit.SECONDS)  // 增加读取超时
        .writeTimeout(15, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
        .build()

    private val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }

    /**
     * Call AI API - ported from main.js callAI()
     * Supports Claude (x-api-key + /messages) and OpenAI-compatible (/chat/completions)
     */
    suspend fun chat(config: AIConfig, prompt: String): String? {
        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null
        val preset = AI_PROVIDERS.find { it.id == config.provider }
        val baseUrl = config.baseUrl.ifBlank { preset?.defaultBaseUrl ?: "" }
        val model = config.model.ifBlank { preset?.defaultModel ?: "" }
        if (baseUrl.isBlank()) return null

        val isClaude = config.provider == "claude" || model.lowercase().contains("claude")
        val url = if (isClaude) "$baseUrl/messages" else "$baseUrl/chat/completions"

        val bodyObj = buildJsonObject {
            put("model", model)
            put("max_tokens", config.maxTokens ?: 2048)  // 增加默认 token
            config.temperature?.let { put("temperature", it) }
            putJsonArray("messages") {
                if (!isClaude) {
                    addJsonObject {
                        put("role", "system")
                        put("content", "你是多语言学习助手。用中文回答。翻译要准确，不要音译。简洁直接。")
                    }
                }
                addJsonObject {
                    put("role", "user")
                    put("content", prompt)
                }
            }
        }

        val headers = if (isClaude) {
            Headers.Builder()
                .add("Content-Type", "application/json")
                .add("x-api-key", config.apiKey)
                .add("anthropic-version", "2023-06-01")
                .build()
        } else {
            Headers.Builder()
                .add("Content-Type", "application/json")
                .add("Authorization", "Bearer ${config.apiKey}")
                .build()
        }

        val request = Request.Builder()
            .url(url)
            .headers(headers)
            .post(bodyObj.toString().toRequestBody("application/json".toMediaType()))
            .build()

        return try {
            val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
            val responseBody = response.body?.string() ?: return null
            val jsonResponse = json.parseToJsonElement(responseBody).jsonObject
            if (isClaude) {
                jsonResponse["content"]?.jsonArray?.firstOrNull()
                    ?.jsonObject?.get("text")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
            } else {
                jsonResponse["choices"]?.jsonArray?.firstOrNull()
                    ?.jsonObject?.get("message")?.jsonObject
                    ?.get("content")?.jsonPrimitive?.contentOrNull
            }
        } catch (e: Exception) {
            null
        }
    }

    /**
     * 分析句子 - 增强版
     * 包含：翻译、语法点、重点词汇、文化背景
     */
    suspend fun analyzeSentence(config: AIConfig, sentence: String, language: String = "英语"): String? {
        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null

        val prompt = "分析以下" + language + "句子：\"" + sentence + "\"\n\n" +
                "请按以下格式输出（用中文回答）：\\n\\n" +
                "【📝 翻译】中文翻译\\n\\n" +
                "【📚 语法】\\n" +
                "1-2个关键语法点，简要说明\\n\\n" +
                "【🎯 重点词汇】\\n" +
                "列出3-5个重要词汇，格式：词汇 - 释义（例句）\\n\\n" +
                "【💡 提示】\\n" +
                "学习建议或文化背景（可选）"

        return chat(config, prompt)
    }

    /**
     * 查词释义 - 增强版
     * 包含：多义项、词性、例句、同义词、反义词
     */
    suspend fun lookupWord(config: AIConfig, word: String, language: String = "英语", context: String = ""): WordLookupResult? {
        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null

        val contextPart = if (context.isNotBlank()) "\n语境：$context" else ""
        val prompt = "查询" + language + "单词：\"" + word + "\"" + contextPart + "\n\n" +
                "请按以下格式输出（用中文回答）：\n\n" +
                "【📖 词汇】" + word + "\n\n" +
                "【🏷️ 词性及释义】\n" +
                "1. 词性：释义\n" +
                "2. 词性：释义\n\n" +
                "【📝 例句】\n" +
                "1. 例句\n" +
                "2. 例句\n\n" +
                "【🔄 同义词】同义词1, 同义词2\n\n" +
                "【⚡ 反义词】反义词（如有）\n\n" +
                "【💡 用法提示】\n" +
                "常见用法或搭配（可选）"

        val result = chat(config, prompt)
        if (result != null) {
            return WordLookupResult(word = word, fullAnalysis = result)
        }
        return null
    }

    /**
     * 修复转录错误
     * 使用 AI 检测并修复转录中的错误
     */
    suspend fun fixTranscription(config: AIConfig, text: String, language: String = "英语"): String? {
        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null

        val prompt = "检测并修复以下" + language + "转录中的错误：\n\n" +
                "原文：\n" + text + "\n\n" +
                "请输出：\n" +
                "【修复后文本】修复后的文本\n" +
                "【修改说明】简要说明修改了哪些错误\n\n" +
                "要求：\n" +
                "1. 修复明显的拼写错误\n" +
                "2. 修正语法错误\n" +
                "3. 改善标点符号\n" +
                "4. 保持原文意思不变"

        return chat(config, prompt)
    }

    /**
     * 批量分析词汇 - 用于批量学习
     */
    suspend fun analyzeVocabulary(config: AIConfig, words: List<String>, language: String = "英语"): String? {
        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null

        val wordList = words.joinToString(", ")
        val prompt = "分析以下" + language + "词汇列表：" + wordList + "\n\n" +
                "请为每个词汇提供：\n" +
                "1. 中文释义\n" +
                "2. 常见搭配\n" +
                "3. 一句例句\n\n" +
                "用表格格式输出，方便查看。"

        return chat(config, prompt)
    }

    /**
     * 生成学习笔记
     */
    suspend fun generateStudyNotes(config: AIConfig, sentences: List<String>, language: String = "英语"): String? {
        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null

        val text = sentences.joinToString("\n")
        val prompt = "根据以下" + language + "内容生成学习笔记：\n\n" + text + "\n\n" +
                "请生成结构化学习笔记，包括：\n" +
                "1. 重点词汇汇总\n" +
                "2. 语法要点\n" +
                "3. 学习建议\n\n" +
                "用 Markdown 格式输出。"

        return chat(config, prompt)
    }

    /**
     * 智能总结视频内容
     * 根据字幕生成视频摘要
     */
    suspend fun summarizeVideo(config: AIConfig, subtitles: List<String>, language: String = "英语"): String? {
        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null

        val text = subtitles.joinToString("\n")
        val prompt = "请总结以下" + language + "视频内容：\n\n" + text + "\n\n" +
                "请提供：\n" +
                "1. 核心主题（1-2句话）\n" +
                "2. 主要观点（3-5个要点）\n" +
                "3. 关键信息（时间、人物、数据等）\n" +
                "4. 学习价值（适合什么人学习）\n\n" +
                "用简洁的中文输出。"

        return chat(config, prompt)
    }

    /**
     * 生成学习计划
     * 根据视频内容和用户水平生成个性化学习计划
     */
    suspend fun generateLearningPlan(
        config: AIConfig,
        videoContent: String,
        userLevel: String = "中级",
        language: String = "英语"
    ): String? {
        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null

        val prompt = "基于以下" + language + "视频内容，为" + userLevel + "学习者生成学习计划：\n\n" +
                videoContent + "\n\n" +
                "请提供：\n" +
                "1. 学习目标（3-5个具体目标）\n" +
                "2. 学习步骤（分阶段，每阶段包含具体任务）\n" +
                "3. 重点难点（需要特别注意的地方）\n" +
                "4. 练习建议（如何巩固学习成果）\n" +
                "5. 预计学习时间\n\n" +
                "用 Markdown 格式输出。"

        return chat(config, prompt)
    }

    /**
     * 对比翻译
     * 提供多个翻译版本供用户选择
     */
    suspend fun compareTranslations(
        config: AIConfig,
        text: String,
        sourceLanguage: String = "英语"
    ): String? {
        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null

        val prompt = "请提供以下" + sourceLanguage + "文本的3种不同翻译：\n\n" +
                "原文：" + text + "\n\n" +
                "请提供：\n" +
                "1. 直译（保持原文结构）\n" +
                "2. 意译（符合中文习惯）\n" +
                "3. 文学翻译（优美流畅）\n\n" +
                "每种翻译后简要说明特点。"

        return chat(config, prompt)
    }

    /**
     * 文化背景解释
     * 解释文本中的文化背景和习语
     */
    suspend fun explainCulturalContext(
        config: AIConfig,
        text: String,
        language: String = "英语"
    ): String? {
        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null

        val prompt = "请解释以下" + language + "文本中的文化背景：\n\n" +
                text + "\n\n" +
                "请说明：\n" +
                "1. 文化背景（历史、社会背景）\n" +
                "2. 习语俚语（如有）\n" +
                "3. 隐含意义（言外之意）\n" +
                "4. 跨文化理解建议\n\n" +
                "用简洁的中文解释。"

        return chat(config, prompt)
    }

    /**
     * 发音指导
     * 提供发音技巧和常见错误
     */
    suspend fun getPronunciationGuide(
        config: AIConfig,
        word: String,
        language: String = "英语"
    ): String? {
        if (config.apiKey.isBlank()) return null

        val prompt = "请提供" + language + "单词「" + word + "」的发音指导：\n\n" +
                "请包括：\n" +
                "1. 音标（IPA）\n" +
                "2. 发音技巧（舌位、口型等）\n" +
                "3. 常见错误（中国学习者容易犯的错误）\n" +
                "4. 相似发音对比\n" +
                "5. 记忆技巧\n\n" +
                "用简洁的中文说明。"

        return chat(config, prompt)
    }
}

/**
 * 词义查询结果
 */
data class WordLookupResult(
    val word: String,
    val fullAnalysis: String
)

content.text:
找到了！代码中所有 AI 服务都使用的是在线 API（OpenAI、Claude、Groq 等），没有本地服务。

**127.0.0.1 连接错误的可能原因：**

1. **GitHub 页面访问问题** - 你可能在尝试访问 GitHub 仓库页面时遇到了浏览器问题
2. **应用内的 WebView** - 如果应用有内嵌浏览器功能，可能配置有误

**解决方案：**

直接在浏览器访问你的 GitHub 仓库：
```
https://github.com/13562964800/legal-stiudio
```

如果是应用运行时的错误，这个应用主要功能包括：
- 视频下载（YouTube、B站等）
- 语音转录（使用 Groq API）
- AI 辅助学习（使用智谱 API）
- 词汇管理

所有功能都是在线服务，不需要本地服务器。如果你在运行应用时遇到这个错误，可能需要：
1. 检查网络连接
2. 确认 API Key 配置正确
3. 查看应用日志了解具体哪个功能报错

需要我帮你检查应用的其他配置吗？

用户问为什么 debug 版本下载速度快。这是一个关于 Android 应用构建配置的问题。让我检查一下项目的构建配置文件，看看 debug 和 release 版本有什么区别。

通常 debug 和 release 版本在以下方面可能有差异：
1. 代码混淆（ProGuard/R8）
2. 代码优化
3. 资源压缩
4. 网络配置
5. 日志输出

让我查看 build.gradle 文件来了解具体配置。

content.text:
找到原因了！**Release 版本下载慢是因为开启了代码混淆和优化**：

```kotlin
buildTypes {
    release {
        isMinifyEnabled = true          // 代码混淆
        isShrinkResources = true        // 资源压缩
        proguardFiles(...)              // ProGuard 优化
    }
}
```

**为什么 Release 版本慢：**

1. **代码混淆影响性能** - ProGuard/R8 可能过度优化了网络相关代码
2. **日志被移除** - Release 版本会移除 Log 语句，可能影响某些逻辑
3. **ProGuard 规则不完整** - 可能误删了下载相关的关键代码

**解决方案：**

content.content: D:\llapk\app\proguard-rules.pro

content.text:
问题找到了！ProGuard 配置过于激进，特别是这几行：

```
-optimizationpasses 5              # 5次优化可能过度
-assumenosideeffects class android.util.Log  # 移除所有日志
-repackageclasses ''               # 重新打包
-mergeinterfacesaggressively       # 激进合并
```

**这会导致下载慢的原因：**
1. 过度优化可能破坏了下载逻辑
2. 移除日志可能影响某些依赖日志的代码路径
3. 激进的类合并可能影响反射和动态调用

**解决方案 - 添加下载相关的保护规则：**

+# 保留 Retrofit 的所有方法

content.text: 已推送到 GitHub。现在来解决转录模式切换不流畅的问题。让我检查一下转录模式切换的实现：

content.content:

    19→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
    20→@Composable

    23→    viewModel: AISettingsViewModel = hiltViewModel()

    29→    LaunchedEffect(uiState.saveSuccess) {
    30→        if (uiState.saveSuccess) {
    31→            delay(600)
    32→            onDismiss()
    33→        }
    34→    }
    35→
    36→    ModalBottomSheet(onDismissRequest = onDismiss) {
    37→        Column(
    38→            modifier = Modifier
    39→                .padding(horizontal = 16.dp)

    41→                .verticalScroll(scrollState)
    42→        ) {
    43→            // ========== 区块1: 转录引擎 ==========
    44→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
    45→                Icon(Icons.Default.Mic, null, Modifier.size(20.dp), tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary)
    46→                Spacer(Modifier.width(8.dp))
    47→                Text("转录引擎", style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium)
    48→            }
    49→            Text(

    51→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
    52→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
    53→            )
    54→
    55→            Spacer(Modifier.height(12.dp))
    56→
    57→            // Groq API Key
    58→            OutlinedTextField(
    59→                value = uiState.groqApiKey,
    60→                onValueChange = viewModel::setGroqApiKey,
    61→                label = { Text("Groq API Key") },
    62→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
    63→                singleLine = true,
    64→                supportingText = { Text("console.groq.com/keys 免费获取") }
    65→            )
    66→
    67→            // 测试转录引擎连接
    68→            Row(

    70→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
    71→            ) {
    72→                TextButton(

    74→                    enabled = !uiState.transcribeTesting

1→package com.multilanglearner.ui.ai
     2→
     3→import androidx.lifecycle.ViewModel
     4→import androidx.lifecycle.viewModelScope
     5→import com.multilanglearner.data.network.AIService
     6→import com.multilanglearner.data.store.AIConfigStore
     7→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.AIConfig
     8→import dagger.hilt.android.lifecycle.HiltViewModel
     9→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
    10→import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.*
    11→import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
    12→import okhttp3.*
    13→import okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType
    14→import okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.toRequestBody
    15→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    16→import javax.inject.Inject
    17→
    18→data class AISettingsUiState(
    19→    val provider: String = "deepseek",
    20→    val apiKey: String = "",
    21→    val baseUrl: String = "",
    22→    val model: String = "",
    23→    val maxTokens: String = "",
    24→    val temperature: String = "",
    25→    val groqWhisperEnabled: Boolean = true,
    26→    val whisperModel: String = "whisper-large-v3",
    27→    val subtitleTranslateMode: String = "none",
    28→    val groqApiKey: String = "",  // 专门的 Groq API Key 用于转录
    29→    val transcribeLanguage: String = "",  // 转录语言代码
    30→    val transcriptionMode: String = "cloud",  // 转录模式
    31→    val testResult: String = "",
    32→    val testSuccess: Boolean = false,
    33→    val saveSuccess: Boolean = false,
    34→    // 转录引擎测试
    35→    val transcribeTestResult: String = "",
    36→    val transcribeTestSuccess: Boolean = false,
    37→    val transcribeTesting: Boolean = false
    38→)
    39→
    40→@HiltViewModel
    41→class AISettingsViewModel @Inject constructor(
    42→    private val configStore: AIConfigStore,
    43→    private val aiService: AIService,
    44→    private val whisperService: com.multilanglearner.data.network.WhisperService
    45→) : ViewModel() {
    46→    private val _uiState = MutableStateFlow(AISettingsUiState())
    47→    val uiState: StateFlow<AISettingsUiState> = _uiState.asStateFlow()
    48→
    49→    init {
    50→        viewModelScope.launch {
    51→            configStore.config.first().let { cfg ->
    52→                _uiState.update {
    53→                    it.copy(
    54→                        provider = cfg.provider, apiKey = cfg.apiKey,
    55→                        baseUrl = cfg.baseUrl, model = cfg.model,
    56→                        maxTokens = cfg.maxTokens?.toString() ?: "",
    57→                        temperature = cfg.temperature?.toString() ?: "",
    58→                        groqWhisperEnabled = cfg.groqWhisperEnabled,
    59→                        whisperModel = cfg.whisperModel,
    60→                        subtitleTranslateMode = cfg.subtitleTranslateMode,
    61→                        groqApiKey = cfg.groqApiKey,
    62→                        transcribeLanguage = cfg.transcribeLanguage,
    63→                        transcriptionMode = cfg.transcriptionMode
    64→                    )
    65→                }
    66→            }
    67→        }
    68→    }
    69→
    70→    fun setProvider(p: String) { _uiState.update { it.copy(provider = p) } }
    71→    fun setApiKey(k: String) { _uiState.update { it.copy(apiKey = k) } }
    72→    fun setBaseUrl(u: String) { _uiState.update { it.copy(baseUrl = u) } }
    73→    fun setModel(m: String) { _uiState.update { it.copy(model = m) } }
    74→    fun setMaxTokens(t: String) { _uiState.update { it.copy(maxTokens = t) } }
    75→    fun setTemperature(t: String) { _uiState.update { it.copy(temperature = t) } }
    76→    fun setGroqWhisper(e: Boolean) { _uiState.update { it.copy(groqWhisperEnabled = e) } }
    77→    fun setWhisperModel(m: String) { _uiState.update { it.copy(whisperModel = m) } }
    78→    fun setTranslateMode(m: String) { _uiState.update { it.copy(subtitleTranslateMode = m) } }
    79→    fun setGroqApiKey(k: String) { _uiState.update { it.copy(groqApiKey = k) } }
    80→    fun setTranscribeLanguage(l: String) { _uiState.update { it.copy(transcribeLanguage = l) } }
    81→    fun setTranscriptionMode(m: String) { _uiState.update { it.copy(transcriptionMode = m) } }
    82→
    83→    fun save() {
    84→        viewModelScope.launch {
    85→            val state = _uiState.value
    86→            configStore.save(AIConfig(
    87→                provider = state.provider, apiKey = state.apiKey,
    88→                baseUrl = state.baseUrl, model = state.model,
    89→                maxTokens = state.maxTokens.toIntOrNull(),
    90→                temperature = state.temperature.toDoubleOrNull(),
    91→                groqWhisperEnabled = state.groqWhisperEnabled,
    92→                whisperModel = state.whisperModel,
    93→                subtitleTranslateMode = state.subtitleTranslateMode,
    94→                groqApiKey = state.groqApiKey,
    95→                transcribeLanguage = state.transcribeLanguage,
    96→                transcriptionMode = state.transcriptionMode
    97→            ))
    98→            // Show save success feedback
    99→            _uiState.update { it.copy(saveSuccess = true) }
   100→            kotlinx.coroutines.delay(1500)
   101→            _uiState.update { it.copy(saveSuccess = false) }
   102→        }
   103→    }
   104→
   105→    fun testConnection() {
   106→        _uiState.update { it.copy(testResult = "测试中...", testSuccess = false) }
   107→        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   108→            val state = _uiState.value
   109→            val config = AIConfig(
   110→                provider = state.provider, apiKey = state.apiKey,
   111→                baseUrl = state.baseUrl, model = state.model,
   112→                maxTokens = state.maxTokens.toIntOrNull(),
   113→                temperature = state.temperature.toDoubleOrNull()
   114→            )
   115→            val result = aiService.chat(config, "请回复\"连接成功\"四个字")
   116→            _uiState.update {
   117→                if (result != null) it.copy(testResult = "✅ $result", testSuccess = true)
   118→                else it.copy(testResult = "❌ 连接失败，请检查设置", testSuccess = false)
   119→            }
   120→        }
   121→    }
   122→
   123→    /**
   124→     * 测试转录引擎连接
   125→     * 通过发送一个简单的 API 请求来验证 Groq API Key 是否有效
   126→     */
   127→    fun testTranscribeConnection() {
   128→        _uiState.update { it.copy(transcribeTestResult = "测试中...", transcribeTestSuccess = false, transcribeTesting = true) }
   129→        viewModelScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
   130→            val state = _uiState.value
   131→            val groqKey = state.groqApiKey.ifBlank {
   132→                // 如果没有专门的 Groq Key，检查是否使用 Groq 作为 AI provider
   133→                if (state.provider == "groq") state.apiKey else ""
   134→            }
   135→
   136→            if (groqKey.isBlank()) {
   137→                _uiState.update { it.copy(
   138→                    transcribeTestResult = "❌ 请先输入 Groq API Key",
   139→                    transcribeTestSuccess = false,
   140→                    transcribeTesting = false
   141→                )}
   142→                return@launch
   143→            }
   144→
   145→            // 使用 AIService 测试连接
   146→            val config = AIConfig(
   147→                provider = "groq",
   148→                apiKey = groqKey,
   149→                baseUrl = "",
   150→                model = state.whisperModel
   151→            )
   152→
   153→            // 发送简单测试请求
   154→            val testResult = aiService.chat(config, "Hi")
   155→
   156→            if (testResult != null) {
   157→                _uiState.update { it.copy(
   158→                    transcribeTestResult = "✅ Groq API 连接成功",
   159→                    transcribeTestSuccess = true,
   160→                    transcribeTesting = false
   161→                )}
   162→            } else {
   163→                _uiState.update { it.copy(
   164→                    transcribeTestResult = "❌ 连接失败，请检查 API Key",
   165→                    transcribeTestSuccess = false,
   166→                    transcribeTesting = false
   167→                )}
   168→            }
   169→        }
   170→    }
   171→}
   172→

content.text: 我看到问题了。当切换转录模式时，UI 状态更新了但没有立即保存，导致切换不流畅。而且用户反馈选择在线转录后卡住了。让我检查转录服务的实现：

1→package com.multilanglearner.service

     3→import android.app.Notification

    34→
    35→/**
    36→ * 转录前台服务
    37→ * 允许用户离开页面后继续转录
    38→ */
    39→@AndroidEntryPoint
    40→class TranscriptionService : Service() {
    41→    companion object {
    42→        private const val TAG = "TranscriptionService"
    43→        private const val CHANNEL_ID = "transcription_channel"
    44→        private const val CHANNEL_NAME = "视频转录"
    45→        private const val NOTIFICATION_ID = 1001
    46→
    47→        const val ACTION_START = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_START_TRANSCRIPTION"
    48→        const val ACTION_CANCEL = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_CANCEL_TRANSCRIPTION"
    49→        const val ACTION_OPEN = "com.multilanglearner.ACTION_OPEN_PLAYER"
    50→
    51→        const val EXTRA_VIDEO_PATH = "video_path"
    52→        const val EXTRA_VIDEO_NAME = "video_name"
    53→
    54→        // 进度广播
    55→        const val ACTION_PROGRESS = "com.multilanglearner.TRANSCRIPTION_PROGRESS"
    56→        const val EXTRA_SEGMENT = "segment"
    57→        const val EXTRA_TOTAL = "total"
    58→        const val EXTRA_PROGRESS = "progress"
    59→        const val EXTRA_MESSAGE = "message"
    60→        const val EXTRA_REMAINING = "remaining"
    61→
    62→        // 队列状态广播
    63→        const val ACTION_QUEUE_UPDATE = "com.multilanglearner.TRANSCRIPTION_QUEUE_UPDATE"
    64→        const val EXTRA_QUEUE_SIZE = "queue_size"
    65→        const val EXTRA_CURRENT_VIDEO = "current_video"
    66→        const val EXTRA_QUEUE_LIST = "queue_list"
    67→
    68→        // 完成广播
    69→        const val ACTION_COMPLETED = "com.multilanglearner.TRANSCRIPTION_COMPLETED"
    70→        const val EXTRA_SUCCESS = "success"
    71→        const val EXTRA_ERROR = "error"
    72→        const val EXTRA_SUBTITLE_COUNT = "subtitle_count"
    73→        const val EXTRA_DETECTED_LANG = "detected_lang"
    74→        const val EXTRA_VTT_PATH = "vtt_path"
    75→
    76→        // 静态状态，供 ViewModel 在页面恢复时查询
    77→        @Volatile var isRunning = false
    78→            private set
    79→        @Volatile var currentVideoName: String? = null
    80→            private set
    81→        @Volatile var currentProgress: Int = 0
    82→            private set
    83→        @Volatile var currentMessage: String = ""
    84→            private set
    85→    }
    86→
    87→    @Inject
    88→    lateinit var ffmpegSegmentedService: FFmpegSegmentedTranscriptionService
    89→
    90→    @Inject
    91→    lateinit var aiConfigStore: AIConfigStore
    92→
    93→    @Inject
    94→    lateinit var sherpaOnnxService: SherpaOnnxTranscriptionService
    95→
    96→    private val serviceScope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.IO + Job())
    97→    private val activeJobs = mutableMapOf<String, Job>() // 支持并行转录
    98→
    99→    private var currentTranscriptionId: String? = null
   100→
   101→    // 用户是否明确触发转录（防止自动重复转录）
   102→    private var userTriggered = false
   103→
   104→    // 转录状态：0=空闲, 1=转录中, 2=已完成, 3=失败, 4=取消
   105→    private var transcriptionStatus = 0
   106→
   107→    // 服务状态
   108→    private val _serviceState = MutableStateFlow<ServiceState>(ServiceState.Idle)
   109→    val serviceState: StateFlow<ServiceState> = _serviceState.asStateFlow()
   110→
   111→    private val binder = LocalBinder()
   112→
   113→    inner class LocalBinder : Binder() {
   114→        fun getService(): TranscriptionService = this@TranscriptionService
   115→    }
   116→
   117→    override fun onBind(intent: Intent?): IBinder = binder
   118→
   119→    override fun onCreate() {
   120→        super.onCreate()
   121→        Log.d(TAG, "Service created")
   122→        createNotificationChannel()
   123→    }
   124→
   125→    override fun onStartCommand(intent: Intent?, flags: Int, startId: Int): Int {
   126→        when (intent?.action) {
   127→            ACTION_START -> {
   128→                val videoPath = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_VIDEO_PATH)
   129→                val videoName = intent.getStringExtra(EXTRA_VIDEO_NAME) ?: "视频"
   130→
   131→                // 检查是否已有正在进行的转录
   132→                if (transcriptionStatus == 1) {
   133→                    Log.w(TAG, "Transcription already in progress, ignoring start request")
   134→                    return START_NOT_STICKY
   135→                }
   136→
   137→                if (videoPath != null) {
   138→                    startTranscription(videoPath, videoName)
   139→                }
   140→            }
   141→            ACTION_CANCEL -> {
   142→                cancelTranscription()
   143→            }
   144→        }
   145→        return START_STICKY
   146→    }
   147→
   148→    /**
   149→     * 开始转录
   150→     */
   151→    private fun startTranscription(videoPath: String, videoName: String) {
   152→        Log.d(TAG, "Starting transcription for: $videoPath")
   153→
   154→        val transcriptionId = System.currentTimeMillis().toString()
   155→
   156→        // 只有用户明确触发才执行转录
   157→        userTriggered = true
   158→
   159→        // 更新转录状态为转录中
   160→        transcriptionStatus = 1
   161→
   162→        // 直接并行执行，不再排队
   163→        executeTranscription(transcriptionId, videoPath, videoName)
   164→    }
   165→
   166→    /**
   167→     * 停止转录并重置用户触发标志
   168→     */
   169→    private fun resetUserTrigger() {
   170→        userTriggered = false
   171→        // 完成或取消后，状态改为空闲
   172→        transcriptionStatus = 0
   173→    }
   174→
   175→    /**
   176→     * 标记转录失败
   177→     */
   178→    private fun markAsFailed() {
   179→        transcriptionStatus = 3
   180→    }
   181→
   182→    /**
   183→     * 执行转录任务
   184→     */
   185→    private fun executeTranscription(
   186→        transcriptionId: String,
   187→        videoPath: String,
   188→        videoName: String
   189→    ) {
   190→        currentTranscriptionId = transcriptionId
   191→        isRunning = true
   192→        currentVideoName = videoName
   193→        currentProgress = 0
   194→        currentMessage = "正在准备..."
   195→
   196→        // 启动前台服务
   197→        startForeground(NOTIFICATION_ID, createProgressNotification(videoName, 0, 0, "正在准备..."))
   198→
   199→        val job = serviceScope.launch {
   200→            try {
   201→                _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Transcribing(0, 0, 0, "正在准备...")
   202→
   203→                val config = aiConfigStore.config.first()
   204→                val videoFile = File(videoPath)
   205→
   206→                // 根据转录模式选择引擎
   207→                val transcriptionMode = config.transcriptionMode
   208→                val useLocal = when (transcriptionMode) {
   209→                    "local" -> true
   210→                    "cloud" -> false
   211→                    "auto" -> !isNetworkAvailable() || videoFile.length() > 100 * 1024 * 1024
   212→                    else -> false
   213→                }
   214→
   215→                Log.d(TAG, "Transcription mode: $transcriptionMode, useLocal: $useLocal")
   216→
   217→                val result = if (useLocal) {
   218→                    // 本地转录
   219→                    if (!sherpaOnnxService.isModelDownloaded()) {
   220→                        sendErrorBroadcast("本地模型未下载，请先在 AI 设置中下载模型")
   221→                        _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error("本地模型未下载")
   222→                        stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   223→                        stopSelf()
   224→                        return@launch
   225→                    }
   226→
   227→                    sherpaOnnxService.transcribe(
   228→                        videoFile,
   229→                        onProgress = { progress, message ->
   230→                            updateProgress(videoName, progress, 100, progress, message)
   231→                            sendProgressBroadcast(progress, 100, progress, message, 0)
   232→                            _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Transcribing(progress, 100, progress, message)
   233→                        }
   234→                    )
   235→                } else {
   236→                    // 云端转录
   237→                    val hasGroqKey = config.groqApiKey.isNotBlank() ||
   238→                                     (config.provider == "groq" && config.apiKey.isNotBlank())
   239→
   240→                    if (!hasGroqKey) {
   241→                        sendErrorBroadcast("❌ 请先配置 Groq API Key\n\n获取 API Key：https://console.groq.com/keys")
   242→                        _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error("请先配置 Groq API Key")
   243→                        stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   244→                        stopSelf()
   245→                        return@launch
   246→                    }
   247→
   248→                    val transcribeLang = config.transcribeLanguage.takeIf { it.isNotBlank() }
   249→                    ffmpegSegmentedService.transcribeWithSegments(
   250→                        videoFile,
   251→                        config,
   252→                        transcribeLang,
   253→                        onProgress = { segment, total, progress, message, remainingSeconds ->
   254→                            updateProgress(videoName, segment, total, progress, message)
   255→                            sendProgressBroadcast(segment, total, progress, message, remainingSeconds)
   256→                            _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Transcribing(
   257→                                segment, total, progress, message
   258→                            )
   259→                        }
   260→                    )
   261→                }
   262→
   263→                // 转录完成
   264→                if (result != null && result.success) {
   265→                    val base = videoPath.substringBeforeLast(".")
   266→                    val vttPath = base + ".vtt"
   267→                    val wtsPath = base + ".wordts.json"
   268→
   269→                    // 如果字幕文件还不存在（可能是其他转录任务创建的），保存它们
   270→                    if (!File(vttPath).exists()) {
   271→                        saveSubtitles(result, vttPath, wtsPath)
   272→                    }
   273→
   274→                    // 保存完成后立即停止服务
   275→                    sendCompletedBroadcast(true, result.detectedLang, result.text, videoPath, vttPath)
   276→                    _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Completed(
   277→                        result.detectedLang,
   278→                        result.text
   279→                    )
   280→
   281→                    updateNotificationComplete(videoName)
   282→
   283→                    // 重置用户触发标志，服务将停止
   284→                    resetUserTrigger()
   285→
   286→                    // 移除已完成的任务
   287→                    activeJobs.remove(transcriptionId)
   288→                    if (activeJobs.isEmpty()) {
   289→                        isRunning = false
   290→                        currentVideoName = null
   291→                        stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   292→                        stopSelf()
   293→                    }
   294→
   295→                } else {
   296→                    val error = result?.error ?: "未知错误"
   297→                    sendErrorBroadcast(error)
   298→                    _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error(error)
   299→
   300→                    // 出错后也重置用户触发标志
   301→                    resetUserTrigger()
   302→
   303→                    activeJobs.remove(transcriptionId)
   304→                    if (activeJobs.isEmpty()) {
   305→                        isRunning = false
   306→                        currentVideoName = null
   307→                        stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   308→                        stopSelf()
   309→                    }
   310→                }
   311→
   312→            } catch (e: Exception) {
   313→                Log.e(TAG, "Transcription error", e)
   314→                val error = "转录失败: ${e.message}"
   315→                sendErrorBroadcast(error)
   316→                _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Error(error)
   317→
   318→                activeJobs.remove(transcriptionId)
   319→                if (activeJobs.isEmpty()) {
   320→                    isRunning = false
   321→                    currentVideoName = null
   322→                    stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   323→                    stopSelf()
   324→                }
   325→            }
   326→        }
   327→        activeJobs[transcriptionId] = job
   328→    }
   329→
   330→    /**
   331→     * 取消转录
   332→     */
   333→    private fun cancelTranscription() {
   334→        activeJobs.values.forEach { it.cancel() }
   335→        activeJobs.clear()
   336→        isRunning = false
   337→        currentVideoName = null
   338→        currentProgress = 0
   339→        currentMessage = ""
   340→        _serviceState.value = ServiceState.Idle
   341→
   342→        // 重置用户触发标志
   343→        resetUserTrigger()
   344→
   345→        stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
   346→        stopSelf()
   347→        Log.d(TAG, "All transcriptions cancelled")
   348→    }
   349→
   350→    /**
   351→     * 保存字幕文件
   352→     */
   353→    private suspend fun saveSubtitles(
   354→        result: WhisperResult,
   355→        vttPath: String,
   356→        wtsPath: String
   357→    ) = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
   358→        val vttBuilder = StringBuilder("WEBVTT\n\n")
   359→        val allWordTimings = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   360→
   361→        if (result.words.isNotEmpty()) {
   362→            var curWords = mutableListOf<WordTimestamp>()
   363→            for (wt in result.words) {
   364→                curWords.add(wt)
   365→                if (wt.w.trim().matches(Regex(".*[.!?。！？]$")) && curWords.isNotEmpty()) {
   366→                    val sentText = curWords.joinToString(" ") { it.w }
   367→                    val sStart = curWords.first().s
   368→                    val sEnd = curWords.last().e
   369→                    vttBuilder.append("${VttParser.formatVtt(sStart)} --> ${VttParser.formatVtt(sEnd)}\n$sentText\n\n")
   370→                    allWordTimings.addAll(curWords)
   371→                    curWords = mutableListOf()
   372→                }
   373→            }
   374→            if (curWords.isNotEmpty()) {
   375→                val sentText = curWords.joinToString(" ") { it.w }
   376→                val sStart = curWords.first().s
   377→                val sEnd = curWords.last().e
   378→                vttBuilder.append("${VttParser.formatVtt(sStart)} --> ${VttParser.formatVtt(sEnd)}\n$sentText\n\n")
   379→                allWordTimings.addAll(curWords)
   380→            }
   381→        }
   382→
   383→        File(vttPath).writeText(vttBuilder.toString())
   384→        if (allWordTimings.isNotEmpty()) {
   385→            val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
   386→            File(wtsPath).writeText(json.encodeToString(ListSerializer(WordTimestamp.serializer()), allWordTimings))
   387→        }
   388→
   389→        Log.d(TAG, "Subtitles saved: ${allWordTimings.size} words")
   390→    }
   391→
   392→    private fun updateProgress(videoName: String, segment: Int, total: Int, progress: Int, message: String) {
   393→        val notification = createProgressNotification(videoName, segment, total, message)
   394→        val notificationManager = getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager
   395→        notificationManager.notify(NOTIFICATION_ID, notification)
   396→    }
   397→
   398→    private fun updateNotificationComplete(videoName: String) {
   399→        val notification = createCompleteNotification(videoName)
   400→        val notificationManager = getSystemService(Context.NOTIFICATION_SERVICE) as NotificationManager
   401→        notificationManager.notify(NOTIFICATION_ID, notification)
   402→    }
   403→
   404→    private fun sendProgressBroadcast(segment: Int, total: Int, progress: Int, message: String, remaining: Long) {
   405→        // 更新静态状态供页面恢复时查询
   406→        currentProgress = progress
   407→        currentMessage = message
   408→
   409→        val intent = Intent(ACTION_PROGRESS).apply {
   410→            putExtra(EXTRA_SEGMENT, segment)
   411→            putExtra(EXTRA_TOTAL, total)
   412→            putExtra(EXTRA_PROGRESS, progress)
   413→            putExtra(EXTRA_MESSAGE, message)
   414→            putExtra(EXTRA_REMAINING, remaining)
   415→        }
   416→        sendBroadcast(intent)
   417→    }
   418→
   419→    private fun sendCompletedBroadcast(success: Boolean, detectedLang: String, text: String, videoPath: String? = null, vttPath: String? = null) {
   420→        val intent = Intent(ACTION_COMPLETED).apply {
   421→            putExtra(EXTRA_SUCCESS, success)
   422→            putExtra(EXTRA_DETECTED_LANG, detectedLang)
   423→            // 计算字幕数量（粗略估计：按句子分割）
   424→            val subtitleCount = text.split(Regex("[.!?。！？]")).filter { it.isNotBlank() }.size
   425→            putExtra(EXTRA_SUBTITLE_COUNT, subtitleCount)
   426→            videoPath?.let { putExtra(EXTRA_VIDEO_PATH, it) }
   427→            vttPath?.let { putExtra(EXTRA_VTT_PATH, it) }
   428→        }
   429→        sendBroadcast(intent)
   430→    }
   431→
   432→    private fun sendErrorBroadcast(error: String) {
   433→        val intent = Intent(ACTION_COMPLETED).apply {
   434→            putExtra(EXTRA_SUCCESS, false)
   435→            putExtra(EXTRA_ERROR, error)
   436→        }
   437→        sendBroadcast(intent)
   438→    }
   439→
   440→    /**
   441→     * 创建通知渠道
   442→     */
   443→    private fun createNotificationChannel() {
   444→        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.O) {
   445→            val channel = NotificationChannel(
   446→                CHANNEL_ID,
   447→                CHANNEL_NAME,
   448→                NotificationManager.IMPORTANCE_LOW
   449→            ).apply {
   450→                description = "显示视频转录进度"
   451→                setShowBadge(false)
   452→            }
   453→            val notificationManager = getSystemService(NotificationManager::class.java)
   454→            notificationManager.createNotificationChannel(channel)
   455→        }
   456→    }
   457→
   458→    /**
   459→     * 创建进度通知
   460→     */
   461→    private fun createProgressNotification(
   462→        videoName: String,
   463→        segment: Int,
   464→        total: Int,
   465→        message: String
   466→    ): Notification {
   467→        val openIntent = Intent(this, com.multilanglearner.MainActivity::class.java).apply {
   468→            action = ACTION_OPEN
   469→            flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP
   470→        }
   471→        val openPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(
   472→            this, 0, openIntent,
   473→            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
   474→        )
   475→
   476→        val cancelIntent = Intent(this, TranscriptionService::class.java).apply {
   477→            action = ACTION_CANCEL
   478→        }
   479→        val cancelPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getService(
   480→            this, 0, cancelIntent,
   481→            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
   482→        )
   483→
   484→        val progressText = if (total > 1) {
   485→            "分段 $segment/$total ($message)"
   486→        } else {
   487→            message
   488→        }
   489→
   490→        return NotificationCompat.Builder(this, CHANNEL_ID)
   491→            .setContentTitle("正在转录: $videoName")
   492→            .setContentText(progressText)
   493→            .setSmallIcon(android.R.drawable.ic_dialog_info)
   494→            .setOngoing(true)
   495→            .setAutoCancel(false)
   496→            .setContentIntent(openPendingIntent)
   497→            .addAction(android.R.drawable.ic_menu_close_clear_cancel, "取消", cancelPendingIntent)
   498→            .setProgress(total, segment, false)
   499→            .build()
   500→    }
   501→
   502→    /**
   503→     * 创建完成通知
   504→     */
   505→    private fun createCompleteNotification(videoName: String): Notification {
   506→        val openIntent = Intent(this, com.multilanglearner.MainActivity::class.java).apply {
   507→            action = ACTION_OPEN
   508→            flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_NEW_TASK or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP
   509→        }
   510→        val openPendingIntent = PendingIntent.getActivity(
   511→            this, 0, openIntent,
   512→            PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT or PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE
   513→        )
   514→
   515→        return NotificationCompat.Builder(this, CHANNEL_ID)
   516→            .setContentTitle("转录完成")
   517→            .setContentText("$videoName 已完成转录")
   518→            .setSmallIcon(android.R.drawable.ic_dialog_info)
   519→            .setOngoing(false)
   520→            .setAutoCancel(true)
   521→            .setContentIntent(openPendingIntent)
   522→            .build()
   523→    }
   524→
   525→    /**
   526→     * 检查网络是否可用
   527→     */
   528→    private fun isNetworkAvailable(): Boolean {
   529→        return try {
   530→            val cm = getSystemService(Context.CONNECTIVITY_SERVICE) as ConnectivityManager
   531→            val network = cm.activeNetwork ?: return false
   532→            val caps = cm.getNetworkCapabilities(network) ?: return false
   533→            caps.hasCapability(NetworkCapabilities.NET_CAPABILITY_INTERNET)
   534→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   535→            Log.e(TAG, "Failed to check network", e)
   536→            false
   537→        }
   538→    }
   539→
   540→    override fun onDestroy() {
   541→        super.onDestroy()
   542→        activeJobs.values.forEach { it.cancel() }
   543→        activeJobs.clear()
   544→        serviceScope.cancel()
   545→        Log.d(TAG, "Service destroyed")
   546→    }
   547→}
   548→
   549→/**
   550→ * 服务状态
   551→ */
   552→sealed class ServiceState {
   553→    object Idle : ServiceState()
   554→    data class Transcribing(
   555→        val segment: Int,
   556→        val total: Int,
   557→        val progress: Int,
   558→        val message: String
   559→    ) : ServiceState()
   560→    data class Completed(
   561→        val detectedLang: String,
   562→        val text: String
   563→    ) : ServiceState()
   564→    data class Error(
   565→        val error: String
   566→    ) : ServiceState()
   567→}
   568→

content.text:
找到问题了！当选择"云端转录"时，代码在第 237-246 行会检查 Groq API Key，如果没有配置就会停止并报错。但问题是：

1. **切换转录模式时没有立即保存** - 用户点击单选按钮后，只更新了 UI 状态，需要点"保存设置"才会真正保存
2. **云端转录需要 Groq API Key** - 如果没配置就会卡住

让我优化这两个问题：

content.text: 好的，现在添加本地模型下载功能，让用户可以选择下载路径。让我先检查 Sherpa-ONNX 服务的实现：

content.content:
1→package com.multilanglearner.data.network
     2→
     3→import android.content.Context
     4→import android.util.Log
     5→import com.arthenica.ffmpegkit.FFmpegKit
     6→import com.multilanglearner.domain.model.WordTimestamp
     7→import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext
     8→import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
     9→import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
    10→import java.io.File
    11→import javax.inject.Inject
    12→import javax.inject.Singleton
    13→
    14→/**
    15→ * Sherpa-ONNX 本地转录服务
    16→ *
    17→ * 使用 Whisper base int8 模型进行离线语音识别
    18→ * 性能：1-2倍实时速度（1分钟音频需30-60秒）
    19→ *
    20→ * 注意：完整实现需要：

     2→
     3→import android.content.Context

     9→import okhttp3.Request
    10→import java.io.File
    11→import java.io.FileOutputStream
    12→import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
    13→import javax.inject.Inject
    14→import javax.inject.Singleton
    15→
    16→/**
    17→ * Sherpa-ONNX 模型下载和管理服务
    18→ *
    19→ * 模型存储位置: context.filesDir/models/sherpa-onnx-whisper-base/
    20→ * 模型文件:
    21→ *   - base-encoder.int8.onnx (~40MB)
    22→ *   - base-decoder.int8.onnx (~40MB)
    23→ *   - base-tokens.txt (~1KB)
    24→ */
    25→@Singleton
    26→class ModelManager @Inject constructor(
    27→    @ApplicationContext private val context: Context
    28→) {
    29→    companion object {
    30→        private const val TAG = "ModelManager"
    31→        private const val MODEL_DIR_NAME = "sherpa-onnx-whisper-base"
    32→
    33→        // Sherpa-ONNX 模型下载地址
    34→        private const val BASE_URL = "https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/"
    35→        private const val ENCODER_FILE = "sherpa-onnx-whisper-base/base-encoder.int8.onnx"
    36→        private const val DECODER_FILE = "sherpa-onnx-whisper-base/base-decoder.int8.onnx"
    37→        private const val TOKENS_FILE = "sherpa-onnx-whisper-base/base-tokens.txt"
    38→
    39→        // 本地文件名
    40→        private const val LOCAL_ENCODER = "base-encoder.int8.onnx"
    41→        private const val LOCAL_DECODER = "base-decoder.int8.onnx"
    42→        private const val LOCAL_TOKENS = "base-tokens.txt"
    43→    }
    44→
    45→    private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
    46→        .connectTimeout(30, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    47→        .readTimeout(600, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
    48→        .followRedirects(true)
    49→        .build()
    50→
    51→    val modelDir: File get() = File(context.filesDir, "models/$MODEL_DIR_NAME")
    52→
    53→    /**
    54→     * 检查模型是否已下载
    55→     */
    56→    fun isModelDownloaded(): Boolean {
    57→        val dir = modelDir
    58→        return File(dir, LOCAL_ENCODER).exists() &&
    59→               File(dir, LOCAL_DECODER).exists() &&
    60→               File(dir, LOCAL_TOKENS).exists()
    61→    }
    62→
    63→    /**
    64→     * 获取模型总大小（MB）
    65→     */
    66→    fun getModelSizeMB(): Double {
    67→        if (!isModelDownloaded()) return 0.0
    68→        return modelDir.walkTopDown()
    69→            .filter { it.isFile }
    70→            .map { it.length() }
    71→            .sum() / 1024.0 / 1024.0
    72→    }
    73→
    74→    /**
    75→     * 下载模型文件
    76→     * @param onProgress (已下载字节, 总字节, 百分比, 当前文件名)
    77→     * @return Result<Boolean> 下载结果
    78→     */
    79→    suspend fun downloadModel(
    80→        onProgress: (Long, Long, Int, String) -> Unit = { _, _, _, _ -> }
    81→    ): Result<Boolean> = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
    82→        try {
    83→            val dir = modelDir
    84→            dir.mkdirs()
    85→
    86→            val files = listOf(
    87→                ENCODER_FILE to LOCAL_ENCODER,
    88→                DECODER_FILE to LOCAL_DECODER,
    89→                TOKENS_FILE to LOCAL_TOKENS
    90→            )
    91→
    92→            var totalDownloaded = 0L
    93→            val estimatedTotal = 80 * 1024 * 1024L
    94→
    95→            for ((remoteFile, localFile) in files) {
    96→                val targetFile = File(dir, localFile)
    97→
    98→                if (targetFile.exists() && targetFile.length() > 100) {
    99→                    Log.d(TAG, "File already exists: $localFile")
   100→                    totalDownloaded += targetFile.length()
   101→                    continue
   102→                }
   103→
   104→                Log.d(TAG, "Downloading: $remoteFile")
   105→                onProgress(totalDownloaded, estimatedTotal, (totalDownloaded * 100 / estimatedTotal).toInt(), localFile)
   106→
   107→                val url = BASE_URL + remoteFile
   108→                val request = Request.Builder().url(url).build()
   109→                val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
   110→
   111→                if (!response.isSuccessful) {
   112→                    Log.e(TAG, "Download failed: ${response.code}")
   113→                    return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("下载失败: $remoteFile (HTTP ${response.code})"))
   114→                }
   115→
   116→                val body = response.body ?: return@withContext Result.failure(Exception("空响应: $remoteFile"))
   117→                val tempFile = File(dir, "$localFile.tmp")
   118→
   119→                body.byteStream().use { input ->
   120→                    FileOutputStream(tempFile).use { output ->
   121→                        val buffer = ByteArray(8192)
   122→                        var bytesRead: Int
   123→
   124→                        while (input.read(buffer).also { bytesRead = it } != -1) {
   125→                            output.write(buffer, 0, bytesRead)
   126→                            totalDownloaded += bytesRead
   127→
   128→                            val percent = (totalDownloaded * 100 / estimatedTotal).toInt().coerceAtMost(99)
   129→                            onProgress(totalDownloaded, estimatedTotal, percent, localFile)
   130→                        }
   131→                    }
   132→                }
   133→
   134→                tempFile.renameTo(targetFile)
   135→                Log.d(TAG, "Downloaded: $localFile")
   136→            }
   137→
   138→            onProgress(totalDownloaded, totalDownloaded, 100, "完成")
   139→            Log.d(TAG, "All model files downloaded")
   140→            Result.success(true)
   141→
   142→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   143→            Log.e(TAG, "Download failed", e)
   144→            Result.failure(e)
   145→        }
   146→    }
   147→
   148→    /**
   149→     * 删除模型文件
   150→     */
   151→    fun deleteModel(): Boolean {
   152→        return try {
   153→            modelDir.deleteRecursively()
   154→        } catch (e: Exception) {
   155→            Log.e(TAG, "Failed to delete model", e)
   156→            false
   157→        }
   158→    }
   159→}

编译成功！只有一些警告，没有错误。现在让我检查一下运行时可能的错误。让我查看 logcat 或者你可以告诉我手机上显示什么错误信息？

同时，让我提交这些改进：

input.command:
cd /d/llapk && git add -A && git commit -m "添加本地模型下载管理功能

- 支持用户自定义模型存储路径
- 添加模型下载进度显示（实时显示下载百分比和文件大小）
- 添加模型删除功能
- 在 AI 设置界面显示模型状态（已下载/未下载）
- 根据转录模式智能显示模型管理选项
- 模型路径持久化保存到 SharedPreferences

功能特性：
- 本地模式：显示模型下载按钮和状态
- 自动模式：同时显示模型管理选项
- 云端模式：不显示模型管理（不需要）
- 下载进度实时更新，完成后自动隐藏提示

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>"

content.text:
已推送成功！现在请告诉我手机上显示的具体错误信息，我可以帮你排查问题。

你可以：
1. 截图发给我看
2. 描述一下错误提示的内容
3. 或者告诉我在哪个操作步骤出现的问题

常见可能的问题：
- **应用闪退** - 可能是依赖注入或初始化问题
- **转录卡住** - 可能是 API Key 配置或网络问题
- **下载失败** - 可能是权限或存储空间问题
- **UI 显示异常** - 可能是状态更新问题

如果你能通过 ADB 查看 logcat，可以运行：
```bash
adb logcat | grep -E "(multilanglearner|AndroidRuntime)"
```

这样可以看到应用的详细日志和崩溃信息。
